title: Bloomberg: Trump Wants to Make H-1B Workers More Expensive for US Employers | Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy LLP
content:
## Bloomberg: Trump Wants to Make H-1B Workers More Expensive for US Employers
Fragomen in Atlanta, GA, United States
- United States: DOL Proposes Rule to Increase PERM and H-1B Wage Minimums
Fragomen in Atlanta, GA, United States
- United States: DOL Proposes Rule to Increase PERM and H-1B Wage Minimums
Fragomen in Atlanta, GA, United States
- United States: DOL Proposes Rule to Increase PERM and H-1B Wage Minimums
In an article published in Bloomberg , Partner Kevin Miner discussed the potential impact of proposed changes to the H-1B program, including higher salary thresholds for employers sponsoring foreign talent. He noted that while some companies may reassess how they structure hiring globally, many employers — particularly in sectors that rely on US-based operations — will continue investing in talent needed to support business growth and innovation.
